summary:
2024 PROPHECIES AND THE VISION OF CORRUPT PREACHERS: Brandon shares a message he received regarding the year 2024. Brandon recounts a vision of preachers standing behind pulpits with smooth oil dripping from their lips and roaches and bugs crawling in and out of their mouths. According to Brandon, these preachers possess selfish motives, aiming only to appease the listeners by falsely whispering that everything will be good, rather than delivering messages that promote spiritual growth.

SPIRITUAL IMMATURITY AND THE SOILED DIAPERS VISION: Brandon describes seeing a vast number of lethargic babies wearing soiled diapers spread across America, surrounded by buzzing flies. Brandon states that this represents a lack of spiritual maturity among the people, as the preachers are failing to teach the substance of the biblical word. Brandon notes that God sees a prevailing pride and stubbornness among the people, which is described as a stench before Him.

THE COMING SHAKING AND THE SLUICE BOX METAPHOR: Brandon details an upcoming period of judgment and shifting within the church, referring to a great Ichabod coming upon the land. Brandon illustrates this with a vision of a sluice box being shaken to separate dirt and manure from gold, symbolizing how a great shaking will remove debris so that righteousness can rise. Brandon warns that this shaking is not limited to America but will affect the entire global population.

THE SEQUOIA TREE AND THE REFINER'S FIRE: Brandon relays a message about the giant sequoia trees in California, explaining that their seeds only release and grow after encountering great fire. Brandon describes a vision of a refiner's fire charring the ground, which subsequently leads to the growth of new green grass, flowers, and sequoia plants. Brandon states that a period of severe testing and hardship will precede the rise of a glorious church characterized by unprecedented healings and spiritual manifestations.

PREPARATION FOR HARDSHIPS AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon warns of impending earthquakes and a global trembling due to the accumulation of sin. Brandon advises listeners to physically prepare by securing food and water supplies, particularly for those living near fault lines. Brandon states that despite these trials, those who walk righteously and maintain daily fellowship with God will be protected and provided for during the refining process.

SPECIFIC HEALINGS AND DELIVERANCE DECLARATIONS: Brandon addresses specific medical and personal issues among the listeners, declaring divine healing and deliverance. Brandon speaks against a demonic spirit causing double-mindedness and split personalities, instructing the individual to fill their mind with the biblical word. Brandon declares physical healing for colon and intestinal cancer, describing a process where tumors and polyps will be flushed from the body. Brandon also commands healing for pancreatic cancer spreading to the liver. Furthermore, Brandon declares restoration and freedom from shame for an individual experiencing emotional trauma from sexual abuse by relatives. Finally, Brandon addresses someone struggling with alcoholism and depression during the holiday season, advising them to stop drinking, avoid sad music, and engage in praise and worship to overcome the demonic stronghold.
rawData: [December 10, 2023]-[The Lord showed me more about the ichabod-like storm coming - prophetic warning]-[https://youtu.be/SGHieO5qcZM]-[Hey, good morning family. I'm excited to be with you all again today. I've taken some time to pray and I've been seeking the Lord about 2024. I don't take this lightly, speaking to you all like this and telling you all what's coming and warning you about the Father's Heart and what's going on in the spirit realm. Like I said, I've just been taking some time seeking Him, getting into the Word more, and not allowing all the pressure of life to try to squash out the voice. This has been a trip for me. I just started this YouTube channel in March, and it's been like a fire hose the last couple of weeks with all the stuff coming—not necessarily always good. I just want to take some time; I have a hard word to give again. I'm going to say it like this: the Lord's called me to say the hard things, y'all, and it's not always easy being me. But I'm going to tell you exactly what's going on regardless of all this other crap you're hearing on the other platforms. That's what I'm going to tell you: it's pure crap. After sitting before the Father last night and getting the download that I got, I hope you all still stick around because I'm going to tell you the truth about what's coming, and you all need to hear it. So here it goes. I was praying before, just like I always do, and I felt the heaviness coming on me. It was very intense intercessory prayer, and all of a sudden, I know when the Lord's about to speak now because I feel it; it's like a bubble up inside of me prophetically. So I told my son, 'Get the recorder out right now because I don't want to forget anything He's going to talk about.' All of a sudden, the Word of the Lord came up to me and I saw a vision. I saw preachers standing behind the pulpits. Holy Spirit, I ask you to deliver it just the way you delivered it the first time. Thank you. I saw preachers standing behind the pulpit and they had oil—this smooth, oily-looking oil—all over their mouths and it was dripping from their lips. They had roaches and bugs crawling in and out of their mouths and laying upon their lips. Bugs were crawling in their teeth and in and out of their mouths and they would lay upon their lips as they would speak. They had a shrewdness in their eyes; their motives behind what they were preaching were all selfish gain, trying to appease the ear of the people. Then I saw ears on the people, and I could see their ears were just being pacified by all these whispers of the things that were happening in the spirit: 'Everything is going to be good; all things are going to work for your good for those that love the Lord.' They were speaking the Word, but they were not speaking what was on God's heart. They were speaking things, but they weren't speaking things to make you grow. I saw these bugs coming out of their teeth and out of their mouths, and I looked across the land of America. There were babies with diapers on all throughout the land. There was nobody with backbone. They were all like really lethargic babies that had diapers on—these Pampers. I saw, whenever you see soiled diapers, the smell that rises up like in cartoons. All the babies had soiled diapers on and there were flies buzzing around those babies. The babies were crying, 'Please, change my diaper!' There were literally thousands and thousands and thousands of babies full of dirty diapers, and the preachers were not teaching them. The Lord spoke to me and he said, 'Brandon, the preachers are not teaching the milk or the meat of the word to grow my children up into adult stature.' He said, 'Therefore, there is going to be a great shifting upon the land.' He said, 'They have raised their noses towards me with a stiff neck.' Their noses were pointed up towards God. I saw a pride that was upon the people. He said, 'There's a pride upon the people and they have a stench before me. Therefore, what is coming... there are prophecies going forth about a great revival, about a great harvest, about all these things, but judgment comes in the house of the Lord first. Therefore, there will be a great shifting take place and there will be what people call a great Ichabod come upon the land.' He said, 'I have told you this before, but there will be a great Ichabod come upon the land.' It would seem like it, but I will never leave you and I will never leave nor will I forsake you. But there will be a shifting, and he said a shaking is coming to the Body. I saw a sluice box, the kind that sifts dirt from the gold, and I saw this manure, dirt, and all this debris inside this box. He said, 'You have to shift the box.' He showed me Him sifting the box and shaking it so the gold rises to the top and the dirt was falling to the ground. But it comes through a great shaking. He said, 'You have to shake all the debris and all the stuff off so that the gold will rise.' Then he said, 'I want you to focus on the great sequoia tree out in California.' He said, 'I want you to focus.' He said, 'The seed does not produce until there is great fire upon it, and it will be released when there is fire upon it.' He said, 'You will be like the great sequoia tree that grows its roots down deep.' I saw a fire coming upon the land, but it was like a refiner's fire—not a physical fire, but a refiner's fire. I saw the refiner's fire burning upon the seed and all of a sudden, the ground from as far as the eye could see was completely charred, tested by fire. In this 'tested by fire,' then I saw new growth, new green grass growing because the weeds and all the stuff were burnt up. I saw green, new flowers, beautiful new things coming. I saw those sequoia plants being planted and growing up because of the fire and the testing that was coming upon the people. The Lord told me, he showed me... like I tell you all, I see calendars sometimes and he shows me things like in windows of time. I saw a time of testing coming. I saw times of hardship coming upon the people. I saw the glorious church rising in a window of time with great glory. I saw an outpouring of the spirit of God and healings and manifestations of the glory beyond anybody's comprehension. But he said the church is not ready for this. He said, 'There must be holiness and righteousness preached back in the pulpits to shake the people, to teach them how to stand on the meat of the word, not on the milk of the word.' There are too many babies and therefore there will be a great shaking coming. Like I said, then all of a sudden I saw people that he said, 'You call me Lord, Lord. You call me savior. You call me your friend.' He said, 'I do not know you, for your heart is far from me.' He said, 'Just like Peter that said he would never deny me, he denied me three times.' Therefore, there will be a lot of you that, just when pressure comes and these great trials come—as the shiftings and the refining fire comes on them—he said, 'You have called me Lord, Lord, but you will deny me three times just like Peter did.' He said there will be a great shifting in this and a great falling away for the ones that call me Lord, Lord, but never really truly made me Lord of their life and made me savior over them. Therefore, those who rise up out of that fire and that refining, he said they are the ones that will have boldness to walk before me in these end times. 'Did I not say in my word,' he said, 'that in the end many will come to me saying, "Did I not prophesy in your name? Did I not lay hands on the sick in your name? Did I not cast out devils in your name?"' and he said, 'Depart from me, I never knew you.' Those scriptures are true and they are alive and they are going forth, and this will happen. Do you understand? Those were prophecies that God spoke before the beginning of time. Look at the words that are coming to pass: all men's hearts will fail them for fear for what's coming upon the earth. They will be lovers of themselves. It is coming upon the land even more—even a greater loving of self. They have itching ears. Their hearts are full of gall and evilness. But the Lord says he's bringing forth a refiner's fire, and many will say it is a great Ichabod. Many will say what's coming is a great Ichabod, but it is not an Ichabod; it is refining. Like I said, I'm not coming on here to give you an itching ear word today to tell you everything is always going to be good for some folks, but I'm going to tell you: if you're walking with the Lord right now, you'll lack nothing. Everything will always be okay with you if you are already walking with Him, if you're walking through that refiner's fire, if you're standing before Him righteous and listening to Him every day and praying and seeking His face daily and reading His word and having fellowship with Him. The Word said, 'I'll never see the righteous forsaken or his seed begging bread.' Think about what He's saying. Many of you say, 'Well, I'm righteous.' No, you're not; you're walking in compromise. I'm coming to tell you there's a lot of you that are babies, just like he told me, and the babies are upon the land. The preachers have been preaching you a smooth, oily, roach-filled word; they aren't teaching you how to stand. You come to this channel and I'm going to tell you: Jesus loves you. He loves you, but he wants you to grow up. He wants you to put your big boy pants on or big girl pants on and walk with him. Stop being these little babies. Get a spine; stand for what the word says. Repent, turn from your wicked ways. You've got to get your heart before Him. Turn—intercession starts to hit me again—you've got to repent and turn because Jesus is coming. You've got to get your heart right before him because Jesus is coming and you aren't ready. I'm going to try to tell you all: you've got to get righteous before him. You've got to get the blood. You've got to come out in communion and pray and live a righteous lifestyle and stop living like the world. If there's no difference between you and the world and you're standing in a prison lineup and they look at you, would they be able to decipher between the world and the church? Are we able to be the light and the salt in these end times? Are we standing out or are we blending in? Do we have a righteousness about our face? Do we have that Holy Ghost glow so that people see us and they want to repent, and they see us and they say there's something different about us, or are we just like them? We're called to stand out. I'm trying to tell you something, y'all. You better hear me. I'm trying to tell you what the Father's heart truly is. He even was upset about things that I've said, always telling you good things. I try to speak to the remnant, but I know I have a lot of babies on my channel and I'm trying to tell you it's time to get in the word; it's time to memorize that scripture. It's time to turn from your wicked ways. You know, a lot of people say, 'Turn or burn.' You need to turn, separate yourself. You say, 'Well, I want to live the way I want to live.' That's what he's talking about. You have a nose that's turned up to him. Go Google what that means—to have a nose that's turned up before the Father. Having your nose turned up or a stiff neck means you're not able to be changed and created to be like him because you're thinking in your own thoughts, 'This is the way I want to be, this is the way I want to act.' So I just want to tell you all what the Lord is saying. And yet you're hearing a lot of things that are all sugarcoated, but I'm telling you a shaking is coming. I'm telling you a great shaking is coming, and it's not all about America. I want you to understand, a lot of people have a lot of pride saying, 'Well, it's about America,' but we're not even 10% of the world's population. The world is going to shake. The bride of Christ is not America; America is a fraction. Do you understand? We are just a little bit of a sliver of the population of the world compared to the world. But I'm telling you, a great shaking is coming to the world. I come on here to tell you what the Lord says, and it's a very heavy thing to do. I have people pulling on me a lot. I'm thankful for this calling, and I'm thankful to be able to come on here and tell you the hard things. I'm thankful for the people that will listen, but you all will listen soon. You all will hear it soon. There are earthquakes coming. I've told you to be prepared; I've told you to have food ready, I've told you to have water ready, and I've told you if you're in an area that is on fault lines, you need to have your stuff ready. You need to listen to me; there's a great shaking coming to this earth. The earth is trembling, the earth is shaking because this cup of sin is full. I'm trying to warn you that the people that are righteous—there are a lot of good people on this channel that love the Lord with all their heart, and I'm not talking to you. I want to give you hope, though, and I want to tell you in the midst of this, you'll never be forsaken. The righteous will never be forsaken, nor his seed begging bread. He said he'll always provide for you; he will always take care of you. Your hearts are for him, and we're going to walk in the glory. They're going to walk in the glory and the revival like we've never seen before. There is a mighty move of the Spirit of God coming upon this earth, but I'm telling you that there's too much compromise and there's going to be a shifting of it. So I hope this was... I did my job. I tell you what he says to say. So I pray for you all. Father, I just thank you, Lord, for every single person that's represented here today. We seek you. Thank you, Lord, that there's a stirring inside of their spirit, Father. I thank you, Lord, for a supernatural fire that's on their life to come up higher. I thank you, Lord, that we are not afraid of the circumstances around us, but we are putting our eyes on you and we're getting our hearts right before you. We seek you, Father, and we don't have a nose that's turned up towards you. We don't have a stiff neck; we're humble, and we humble ourselves to you, Father. We seek you, and we thank you, Lord, that you have our lives in your hand. Great and mighty works will you do; you said that, Lord. I thank you, Father, that we are going to do the great works. We're going to be ready for you. Our lamps are full of oil, and our hearts and our eyes are seeking you daily. We're seeking you, for you said the eyes of the Lord are running to and fro throughout the whole earth, looking for a heart who's perfect towards me. Father, I thank you, Lord, that your eyes are falling upon my house today. I thank you, Father, that your eyes rest upon us, that your eyes are not busy looking because you found me. You found me in my house. We seek you, Father. Create in us a clean heart, Lord. Give us a pure heart before you, Father. Create in us, Father, what you're looking for. I thank you, Lord, that we humble ourselves before you, God. Our eyes and our minds think like what we're supposed to think. We seek you. We anoint ourselves with oil. Our cup runneth over. Surely goodness and mercy will follow us all the days of our life, and we will dwell in the house of the Lord forever. Father, we thank you, Lord, for your blood. We thank you, Lord, for your righteousness. We thank you, Lord, for how good you've been to us. You are so good to us, Father. I'm not moved by what I see, I'm not moved by what I feel; I'm moved by what the Word says. Father, we just give you praise and glory for it right now in the name of Jesus. We humble ourselves before you, Father. We humble ourselves and we worship you. You are good, and your mercy endures forever, Lord. You are good, and your mercy endures forever, and we worship you today, Father. We worship you. Thank you, Lord, that our marriages are strong, our children are healthy. I thank you, Lord, we take authority over sickness and disease and over all kinds of back issues and brain issues and turmoil in their minds. I just saw somebody right now—you've been tormented with double-mindedness. It's like a split personality; it's almost like you feel trapped. I see somebody who is trapped; it's almost like in a mirror. It's very strange what I just saw, but this is a demonic spirit that has attached itself to you. You stare at yourself in the mirror, and it's almost like you have a split personality. Father, I thank you that you're setting this person free right now in the name of Jesus. We command that devil to release them right now and let them go. You spirit of torment, we command you to release their mind right now in Jesus' name. Angels of the Lord manifest and make war against this demonic force. We command you to release them right now. We command it to go to the dry places right now. You demonic spirits that have attached yourself to this person, we command them free by the blood of the Lamb and by the word of the testimony. We break that off of them right now. Fill that with... I just saw an empty cavern right then after we called that devil to leave. You have to fill and renew your mind with the Word so that it's not empty no more, or they're going to come back eight more. You better listen to me. You be free, but you've got to fill your mind back up with the Word. You've got to fill it back up. It's not just a one-time process; you've got to do this daily. You've got to get in the Word daily and fill that mind up with the Word—your mind, your will, and your emotions; spirit, soul, and body. Thank you, Father. I see right now somebody—you're overcoming some kind of colon cancer in your intestines. You've got intestinal cancer, and I'm telling you right now, you're getting there. There is like a Roto-Rooter cleaning you out. I call your colon healed and whole and well in Jesus' name. All throughout your intestines, all throughout your digestive system—a complete healing and wholeness of all these little polyps and all this stuff going on inside of you. I call you healed and whole and well in the name of Jesus. Completely delivered, like a Roto-Rooter cleaning those out. Oh, I see it right now. You're going to release them in your stool through the waste, and don't freak out if there is blood in your stool right now. It's going to clean you out like a Roto-Rooter. All those little things, you're going to pass them in your waste. It's going to come out of you. That's actually kind of gross, but it is the truth and that's what the Lord showed me in a vision. You can go to the bathroom; when you clean, it's going to come out of you. It's going to be a Roto-Rooter; you're going to clean it out in Jesus' name. All those little tumors, those little things are coming out of you right now in the name of Jesus. I call you healed and whole and well in the name of Jesus, from the top of your head to the soles of your feet. I just saw pancreatic cancer healed and whole in the name of Jesus. Pancreas, be healed and whole and well in Jesus' name. From the top of your head to the soles of your feet, every cancer cell, you're healed and whole and well from that and delivered from cancer of the pancreas in Jesus' name, completely set free. It's trying to spread over even onto your liver; I pray over your liver right now in the name of Jesus. Delivered from this demonic cancer, I command you to release it right now in Jesus' name. Get out of their body, cancer! Go! New pancreas, new liver, new area all throughout those ducts, be healed and whole and well in Jesus' healing name. Great Mighty Holy Spirit, Great Physician, you are healed and whole and well in the name of Jesus. From the top of their head to the soles of their feet, it's tried to spread, but that is gone in Jesus' name. We call good reports over them. We call healing, wholeness, wellness, and deliverance in Jesus' name. With long life, you'll satisfy them and show them your salvation in Jesus' name. Healing and wholeness and wellness. We take authority over the spirit of fear over death; we take authority over that spirit of death right now in Jesus' name. Fear of dying, the torment of death—fear has torment, but perfect love casts out all fear. We call peace that passes all understanding over you right now. You're crying, I see you. You're healed and whole and well. Be of good cheer. More life, life-giving faith in your flesh. His word is health to all their flesh. Meditate on the word in Jesus' name. Somebody has emotional trauma from being abused by relatives sexually; I call restoration over your life. I call you restored in Jesus' name. Your mind is tormented; I call you delivered from this in Jesus' name. The torment of shame—no more shame in Jesus' name. There's nothing for you to be ashamed of; you did nothing wrong. They try to make it like you were the problem or you brought it on yourself—that's a lie from the pit of hell. You did nothing wrong. No matter how you dressed or whatever, they had a spirit of perversion and the devil came to try to kill, steal, and destroy your life, and he lost. Demonic spirits of depression and things that are linked on, the Lord is setting you free right now. I call you free from that in Jesus' name. That torment—you did nothing wrong, hun. The Lord Jesus Christ sets you free right now. From the top of your head to the soles, you feel fire is going through your body right now. I saw fire go through you right now—fire of the Holy Ghost go through right now in the name of Jesus, delivering them from that, and we call you free from it right now. I don't know who you are, but Jesus Christ loves you. Some people have so much hurt; Jesus loves you. You've been dealing with that for a long time. Father, I thank you that the peace that passes understanding is over them. You help them right now. And Jesus said, 'Peace I leave with you; my peace I give to you.' Lord, we just thank you for all that you've done for these people today. I just saw this: somebody is dealing with alcoholism concerning this holiday season. I take authority over the spirit of alcoholism right now in Jesus' name. You're drinking and listening to sad music—stop feeding that depression like that. Put some joy on, put some happiness on, and feed on the word. Shake that off; don't have that heaviness on you. It's a choice. It's a demonic spirit trying to latch onto you because of the holidays and things going on, but Jesus has come to set you free. Don't feed on that anymore. That's a demonic spirit trying to get a stronghold in your life. Don't be drinking anymore; get in the word and put on a garment of praise for a spirit of heaviness. Put on some worship—praise and worship—and get that atmosphere in your house. Get set free from all that. Don't let the devil get a stronghold in your life. This is a joyous time; Jesus came and he set the captives free. He was born in a manger and he came for you and me. Jesus loves you so much and we love you. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you so much and we will see you next time. Have a blessed day, y'all. Bye-bye.]
